expo.name: Ridhi
expo.description: India's #1 social networking and dating app — connect, share, and find love.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ridhi uses your location to show people and content near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ridhi needs camera access to let you post photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ridhi needs photo library access to let you share images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Ridhi needs microphone access for video posts and voice messages.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Ridhi uses your location to show people and content near you.
